result.result:
## This week on agent-office (Apr 13–18, 2026)

**63 commits, all on `main`.** The repo went from empty to a functioning unified-memory agent launcher in six days.

**Apr 13 — foundation (3 commits)**
- `bd59458` Phase 1 Foundation
- `6a1ede2` Phase 2 Agent Core (personas, skills, resolver, launcher)
- `ca066d7` Phase 3 Memory Engine (domain-scoped queries, injector, importer)
- `eaebe7c` Phase 4 Office UI — React frontend with animated scene

**Apr 14 — engine extraction + launch preview (29 commits)**
- Extracted pixel-agents into modular engine: constants/types (`a88a3c6`), sprites (`54fcd13`), floor/wall tiles (`0f10b2a`), layout serializer/catalog/pathfinding (`9df83eb`), core state/renderer/game loop (`769983d`), browser asset loader (`fd62f21`).
- Office shell: 25×20 default with 7 themed zones (`a4ef81e`), OfficeCanvas React wrapper (`c8c8f57`), 3-column dashboard (`68467b0`), zone labels + coordinate fixes (`c818ff3`, `b1ca00b`, `48daeac`).
- Launcher: iTerm2 spawn (`64ed75e`), read-only claude-mem SQLite adapter (`d109f26`), persona→observation heuristic filter (`e079b4f`), claude-mem context injection + `preview()` (`1c875a4`), preview API + full `launch()` (`acdddfa`), LaunchPreview UI (`27cb1d3`, `c0f0d86`), Phase 4.5+4.6 merged (`6b61356`).

**Apr 15 — telemetry + launch redesign (6 commits)**
- `2534692`/`3199451` Phase 5 telemetry dashboard merged to main
- `4d9806d` provider adapters + office state + portfolio stats
- `42aab52` picker redesign with provider-aware preview
- `a4cb528` local skill roots + launch inventory
- `c1a2dc7` UTC anchor fix for today-window stats

**Apr 16 — provider-neutral history + stability (8 commits)**
- `9c4afb4` provider-neutral project history ingestion
- `3b9f1a9` `doctor` command
- `aaa47ed`/`a8f6bd4` live-session stability (idle grace, presence)
- `fc03de3` codex history summary enrichment; `ef1cec2` local port resolution; `1e39b01` licensing/provenance docs

**Apr 18 — unified memory + brief benchmarks (13 commits)**
- `1b6fbb5` Codex submission-id matching fix
- `d5da889` office floor simplified to Boss / Workspace / Dungeon + Fixer
- `4d9a58a` persona-scoped memory brief generator; `40c5014` bench harness for brief-vs-raw token savings
- `01f2a70` Playwright LinkedIn carousel capture; `831f303` startup/dev launcher shell scripts; `0c3dfbd` added `sqlite-vec`, `@huggingface/transformers`, playwright
- `18e1cbb` README rewrite around unified-memory USP
- `17bf243` brief wired into live session launch; `ec56fb9` brief rendered in LaunchPreview
- `2dbef00` unified memory stats + semantic search (dropped claude-mem fallback); `3c1cf94` persona memory stats + semantic search in project picker
- `3b6c0b4` LaunchWizard consolidated into single 4-step modal

**Uncommitted / untracked (flagged but not shipped):** `bench/` directory plus `scripts/bench-aggregate.mjs`, `scripts/bench-judge.mjs`, `scripts/bench-whitepaper.mjs` — still sitting in working tree per `git status`. Decision on commit-vs-gitignore was noted as the next step (memory S294) but hasn't been acted on.

**Caveats:** I verified every commit hash and date above against `git log`. I did not read the diffs, so claims reflect commit messages, not line-level behavior — if you want me to verify that, say which area.
